column1: 800g boneless chicken thighs, cut into chunks
Salt and black pepper to taste
For garnish: cilantro, sour cream, avocado slices
Sliced cucumbers, cherry tomatoes, lettuce (for bowl)
Tahini sauce or garlic sauce (for drizzling)
1/2 tsp saffron strands soaked in warm milk
Fried onions and lemon wedges (for garnish)
